CONTENT.Career: Nardi is a youth exponent from Nancy. He made his Ligue 2 debut at 13 September 2013 against Créteil-Lusitanos. He never left the starting eleven since then.On 7 June 2014, Nardi joined Monaco, for a fee of £2.5 million. He returned to Nancy on loan for the 2014–15 season.On 22 June 2016, he joined Rennes on a 1-year loan, with an option to buy. On 2 January 2017, Nardi and Rennes agreed a loan termination, and he  joined Cercle Brugge on a two and a half season loan.On 23 July 2019, Nardi joined Lorient on a four-year deal.On 31 August 2022, Nardi joined Belgian First Division A club Gent on a two-year deal.On 27 June 2024, Nardi agreed to join English Championship side Queens Park Rangers.

SUMMARY: Paul Nardi (born 18 May 1994) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL Championship club Queens Park Rangers.
